case_title: WATSONVILLE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL VS. PETER REBMANN` ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: WAIVING ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100049093) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATSONVILLE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100049093) AS TO DEFENDANT REBMANN`, PETER
